coreFinding: Full Harness Cards repeatedly outperform weak baseline corrections on layered context failures, restart loops, lost constraints, and fake certainty. Simple output-format failures remain the boundary case: several models prefer Mini Harness or direct correction, but Copilot showed Full Harness can still win when baseline corrections keep overexplaining.

weightRule.Full: Use for context drift, lost constraints, restart loops, fake certainty, handoff failure, source/trust confusion, and layered constraints.
weightRule.Mini: Use for output-format problems like code-only, no explanation, shorter, or just-give-answer.
weightRule.Direct: Use when the fix is obvious and one sentence is enough.

privacyNote: Public seed data has been sanitized to avoid emails, local paths, and personal identifiers. Do not commit private transcripts, API keys, or raw personal conversations.
